title: calodendrum capense
intro: Calodendrum capense, also known as the Yellowwood, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Calodendrum capense include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Calodendrum capense include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves or bark in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
